bugs.symptom: POST /auth/login returned 401 twice for sarankarthick.maran@nulogic.io / Welcome@123
bugs.evidence: [ApiClient] Error: POST /auth/login 401 Request failed with status code 401 (2 occurrences at 21:57:25 and 21:57:39)
bugs.notes: Credentials may be invalid for HR_ADMIN, or account is locked (AccountLockoutService: 5 attempts / 15min). Parallel worker auth rate limit (5/min) also a suspect; 45s wait between attempts did not resolve.
